AccessRole.description: Access role conferred by an AdminPolicy to objects within it. (used by Argo)

members.description: The users and groups that are members of the role

AccessRoleMember.description: Represents a user or group that is a member of an AccessRole

AdminPolicyAccessTemplate.description: Provides the template of access settings that is copied to the items governed by an AdminPolicy. This is almost the same as DROAccess, but it provides no defaults and has no embargo.

registrationWorkflow.description: When you register an item with this admin policy, these are the workflows that are available.

disseminationWorkflow.description: An additional workflow to start for objects managed by this admin policy once the end-accession workflow step is complete

collectionsForRegistration.description: When you register an item with this admin policy, these are the collections that are available.

roles.description: The access roles conferred by this AdminPolicy (used by Argo)

AdminPolicyWithMetadata.description: Admin Policy with addition object metadata.

AppliesTo.description: Property model for indicating the parts, aspects, or versions of the resource to which a descriptive element is applicable.

BusinessBarcode.description: The barcode associated with a business library DRO object, prefixed with 2050

CatalogLink.description: A linkage between an object and a catalog record

CatkeyBarcode.description: The barcode associated with a DRO object based on catkey, prefixed with a catkey followed by a hyphen

CitationOnlyAccess.description: A type of access for an object wherein users can see the metadata and a list of files, but the files will not have view or download access

location.description: Not used for this access type, must be null.

CocinaVersion.description: The version of Cocina with which this object conforms.

Collection.description: A group of Digital Repository Objects that indicate some type of conceptual grouping within the domain that is worth reusing across the system.

type.description: The content type of the Collection. Selected from an established set of values.

label.description: Primary processing label (can be same as title) for a Collection.

version.description: Version for the Collection within SDR.

Contributor.description: Property model for describing agents contributing in some way to the creation and history of the resource.

type.description: Entity type of the contributor (person, organization, etc.). See https://github.com/sul-dlss/cocina-models/blob/main/docs/description_types.md for valid types.

status.description: Status of the contributor relative to other parallel contributors (e.g. the primary author among a group of contributors).

role.description: Relationships of the contributor to the resource or to an event in its history.

identifier.description: Identifiers and URIs associated with the contributor entity.

affiliation.description: Institutional or other affiliation associated with a contributor.

note.description: Other information associated with the contributor.

valueAt.description: URL or other pointer to the location of the contributor information.

parallelContributor.description: For multiple representations of information about the same contributor (e.g. in different languages).

location.description: Not used for this access type, must be null.

Copyright.description: The human readable copyright statement that applies

CreatedInFolioIdentifier.description: A record identifier created in Folio

DOIExceptions.description: The DOI (Digital Object Identifier, https://www.doi.org) pattern for objects in SDR that do not adhere to any of the other DOI patterns in the spec. This is a short list of known exceptions only. Please note that DOIs are *not* case-sensitive, so we allow for uppercase and lowercase letters with these exceptions.

DRO.description: Domain-defined abstraction of a 'work'. Digital Repository Objects' abstraction is describable for our domain’s purposes, i.e. for management needs within our system.

type.description: The content type of the DRO. Selected from an established set of values.

label.description: Primary processing label (can be same as title) for a DRO.

version.description: Version for the DRO within SDR.

contains.description: Filesets that contain the digital representations (Files)

hasMemberOrders.description: Provided sequences or orderings of members, including some metadata about each sequence (i.e. sequence label, sequence type, if the sequence is primary, etc.).

isMemberOf.description: Collections that this DRO is a member of

location.description: Not used for this access type, must be null.

DescriptiveAccessMetadata.description: Information about how to access digital and physical versions of the object.

url.description: URLs where the resource may be accessed in full or part.

physicalLocation.description: Location of a physical version of the resource.

digitalLocation.description: Location of a digital version of the resource, such as a file path for a born digital resource.

accessContact.description: The library, organization, or person responsible for access to the resource.

digitalRepository.description: The digital repositories that hold the resource.

note.description: Other information related to accessing the resource.

event.description: Events in the history of this resource description.

language.description: Languages, scripts, symbolic systems, and notations used in this resource description.

note.description: Other information related to this resource description.

metadataStandard.description: Descriptive or content standard(s) to which this resource description conforms.

identifier.description: Identifiers associated with this resource description.

DescriptiveBasicValue.description: Basic value model for descriptive elements. Can only have one of value, parallelValue, groupedValue, or structuredValue.

value.description: String or integer value of the descriptive element.

type.description: Type of value provided by the descriptive element. See https://github.com/sul-dlss/cocina-models/blob/main/docs/description_types.md for valid types.

status.description: Status of the descriptive element value relative to other instances of the element.

code.description: Code value of the descriptive element.

uri.description: URI value of the descriptive element.

identifier.description: Identifiers and URIs associated with the descriptive element.

displayLabel.description: The preferred display label to use for the descriptive element in access systems.

qualifier.description: A term providing information about the circumstances of the statement (e.g., approximate dates).

note.description: Other information related to the descriptive element.

valueAt.description: URL or other pointer to the location of the value of the descriptive element.

DescriptiveGeographicMetadata.description: Value model for mods geographic extension metadata

subject.description: Terms associated with the intellectual content of the related resource.

DescriptiveGroupedValue.description: Value model for a set of descriptive elements grouped together in an unstructured way.

DescriptiveParallelContributor.description: Value model for multiple representations of information about the same contributor (e.g. in different languages).

type.description: Entity type of the contributor (person, organization, etc.). See https://github.com/sul-dlss/cocina-models/blob/main/docs/description_types.md for valid types.

status.description: Status of the contributor relative to other parallel contributors (e.g. the primary author among a group of contributors).

role.description: Relationships of the contributor to the resource or to an event in its history.

identifier.description: Identifiers and URIs associated with the contributor entity.

note.description: Other information associated with the contributor.

valueAt.description: URL or other pointer to the location of the contributor information.

DescriptiveParallelEvent.description: Value model for multiple representations of information about the same event (e.g. in different languages).

type.description: Description of the event (creation, publication, etc.).

displayLabel.description: The preferred display label to use for the event in access systems.

identifier.description: Identifiers and URIs associated with the event.

DescriptiveParallelValue.description: Value model for multiple representations of the same information (e.g. in different languages).

DescriptiveStructuredValue.description: Value model for descriptive elements structured as typed, ordered values.

DescriptiveValue.description: Default value model for descriptive elements.

DescriptiveValueLanguage.description: Language of the descriptive element value

releaseDate.description: Date when the Collection is released from an embargo.

Event.description: Property model for describing events in the history of the resource.

type.description: Description of the event (creation, publication, etc.).

displayLabel.description: The preferred display label to use for the event in access systems.

identifier.description: Identifiers and URIs associated with the event.

parallelEvent.description: For multiple representations of information about the same event (e.g. in different languages)

File.description: Binaries that are the basis of what our domain manages. Binaries here do not include metadata files generated for the domain's own management purposes.

type.description: The content type of the File.

externalIdentifier.description: Identifier for the resource within the SDR architecture but outside of the repository. UUID. Constant across resource versions. What clients will use calling the repository.

label.description: Primary processing label (can be same as title) for a File.

filename.description: Filename for a file. Can be same as label.

size.description: Size of the File (binary) in bytes.

version.description: Version for the File within SDR.

sdrGeneratedText.description: Indicates if the text (OCR/captioning) was generated by SDR.

correctedForAccessibility.description: Indicates if text that has been verified for accessibility/correctness.

FileSet.description: Relevant groupings of Files. Also called a File Grouping.

type.description: The content type of the Fileset.

label.description: Primary processing label for a Fileset.

version.description: Version for the Fileset within SDR.

FileUse.description: Use for the File (e.g. 'transcription' for OCR).

FolioCatalogLink.description: A linkage between an object and a Folio catalog record

catalog.description: Catalog that is the source of the linked record.

refresh.description: Only one of the Folio instance HRIDs should be designated for refreshing. This means that this HRID is the one used to pull metadata from the catalog if there is more than one HRID present.

catalogRecordId.description: Record identifier that is unique within the context of the linked record's catalog.

partLabel.description: Label for use in display of serials via Folio record

sortKey.description: Sorting information for use in display of serials via Folio record

LaneMedicalBarcode.description: The barcode associated with a Lane Medical Library DRO object, prefixed with 245

Language.description: Languages, scripts, symbolic systems, and notations used in all or part of a resource or its descriptive metadata.

code.description: Code value of the descriptive element.

displayLabel.description: The preferred display label to use for the descriptive element in access systems.

groupedValue.description: present for mapping to additional schemas in the future and for consistency but not otherwise used

note.description: present for mapping to additional schemas in the future and for consistency but not otherwise used

parallelValue.description: present for mapping to additional schemas in the future and for consistency but not otherwise used

qualifier.description: present for mapping to additional schemas in the future and for consistency but not otherwise used

status.description: Status of the language relative to other parallel language elements (e.g. the primary language)

structuredValue.description: present for mapping to additional schemas in the future and for consistency but not otherwise used

uri.description: URI value of the descriptive element.

valueAt.description: URL or other pointer to the location of the language information.

LanguageTag.description: BCP 47 language tag: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc4646.txt -- other applications (like media players) expect language codes of this format, see e.g. https://videojs.com/guides/text-tracks/#srclang

LibrariesDOI.description: The DOI (Digital Object Identifier, https://www.doi.org) pattern for works registered by Stanford Libraries outside of SDR workflows. Please note that DOIs are *not* case-sensitive so both cases of letters should be permitted.

License.description: The license governing reuse of the DRO. Should be an IRI for known licenses (i.e. CC, RightsStatement.org URI, etc.).

location.description: If access or download is 'location-based', which location should have access.
Which location should have download access.

MessageDigest.description: The output of the message digest algorithm.

MigratedFromSymphonyIdentifier.description: A record identifier migrated from Symphony

MigratedFromVoyagerIdentifier.description: A record identifier migrated from Voyager

lock.description: Key for optimistic locking. The contents of the key is not specified.

PreregisteredRepositoryDOI.description: The DOI (Digital Object Identifier, https://www.doi.org) pattern for DOIs registered before an SDR object has been registered---i.e., before it has a druid, which is a common pattern as of 2025. Please note that DOIs are *not* case-sensitive so both cases of letters should be permitted.

Purl.description: Stanford persistent URL associated with the related resource.

RelatedResource.description: Other resource associated with the described resource.

type.description: The relationship of the related resource to the described resource.

dataCiteRelationType.description: The DataCite relationType describing the relationship from the related resource to the described resource. See https://datacite-metadata-schema.readthedocs.io/en/4.6/appendices/appendix-1/relationType

status.description: Status of the related resource relative to other related resources.

displayLabel.description: The preferred display label to use for the related resource in access systems.

contributor.description: Agents contributing in some way to the creation and history of the related resource.

event.description: Events in the history of the related resource.

form.description: Characteristics of the related resource's physical, digital, and intellectual form and genre, and of its process of creation.

language.description: Languages, scripts, symbolic systems, and notations used in all or part of a related resource.

note.description: Additional information relevant to a related resource.

identifier.description: Identifiers and URIs associated with the related resource.

subject.description: Terms associated with the intellectual content of the related resource.

relatedResource.description: Other resources associated with the related resource.

version.description: The version of the related resource.

valueAt.description: URL or other pointer to the location of the related resource information.

RepositoryDOI.description: The DOI (Digital Object Identifier, https://www.doi.org) pattern for SDR objects, based on the object's repository identifier. Permits both production and text prefixes to be used to account for objects in different SDR environments. Please note that while DOIs are *not* case-sensitive, we constrain the DOIs we mint for SDR to lowercase for consistency.

RequestAdminPolicy.description: Same as an AdminPolicy, but doesn't have an externalIdentifier as one will be created

partOfProject.description: Internal project this resource is a part of. This governs routing of messages about this object.

RequestCollection.description: Same as a Collection, but doesn't have an externalIdentifier as one will be created

RequestDRO.description: A request to create a DRO.  This has the same general structure as a DRO but doesn't have externalIdentifier and doesn't require the access subschema. If no access subschema is provided, these values will be inherited from the AdminPolicy.

isMemberOf.description: Collections that this DRO is a member of

RequestDescription.description: Description that is included in a request to create a DRO. This is the same as a Description, except excludes PURL.

contributor.description: Agents contributing in some way to the creation and history of the resource.

event.description: Events in the history of the resource.

form.description: Characteristics of the resource's physical, digital, and intellectual form and genre, and of its process of creation.

geographic.description: Geographic description for items with coordinates or bounding boxes.

language.description: Languages, scripts, symbolic systems, and notations used in all or part of a resource.

note.description: Additional information relevant to a resource.

identifier.description: Identifiers and URIs associated with the resource.

subject.description: Terms associated with the intellectual content of the resource.

relatedResource.description: Other resources associated with the described resource.

marcEncodedData.description: Data about the resource represented in MARC fixed fields and codes.

valueAt.description: URL or other pointer to the location of the resource description.

sdrGeneratedText.description: Indicates if the text (OCR/captioning) was generated by SDR.

correctedForAccessibility.description: Indicates if text that has been verified for accessibility/correctness.

RequestIdentification.description: Same as a Identification, but requires a sourceId and doesn't permit a DOI.

Sequence.description: A sequence or ordering of resources within a Collection or Object.

members.description: Identifiers for Members in their stated Order for the Sequence.

viewingDirection.description: The direction that a sequence of canvases should be displayed to the user

Source.description: Property model for indicating the vocabulary, authority, or other origin for a term, code, or identifier.

note.description: Other information related to the value source.

version.description: The version of the value source.

SourceId.description: Unique identifier in some other system. This is because a large proportion of what is deposited in SDR, historically and currently, are representations of objects that are also represented in other systems. For example, digitized paper and A/V collections have physical manifestations, and those physical objects are managed in systems that have their own identifiers. Similarly, books have barcodes, archival materials have collection numbers and physical locations, etc. The sourceId allows determining if an item has been deposited before and where to look for the original item if you're looking at its SDR representation. The format is: "namespace:identifier"

Standard.description: Property model for indicating the encoding, standard, or syntax to which a value conforms (e.g. RDA).

code.description: Code representing the standard or encoding.

uri.description: URI for the standard or encoding.

value.description: String describing the standard or encoding.

note.description: Other information related to the standard or encoding.

version.description: The version of the standard or encoding.

StandardBarcode.description: The standard barcode associated with a DRO object, prefixed with 36105

location.description: Not used for this access type, must be null.

SymphonyCatalogLink.description: A linkage between an object and a Symphony catalog record

catalog.description: Catalog that is the source of the linked record.

refresh.description: Only one of the catkeys should be designated for refreshing. This means that this key is the one used to pull metadata from the catalog if there is more than one key present.

catalogRecordId.description: Record identifier that is unique within the context of the linked record's catalog.

UseAndReproductionStatement.description: The human readable use and reproduction statement that applies
UseAndReproductionStatement.example: Property rights reside with the repository. Literary rights reside with the creators of the documents or their heirs. To obtain permission to publish or reproduce, please contact the Public Services Librarian of the Dept. of Special Collections (http://library.stanford.edu/spc).

location.description: Not used for this access type, must be null.
